title: Kuromi Has a Sister?
overview: Kuromi has a sister?! Yes, she does! In this episode, Kuromi shares with Baku all about her long lost sister, Romina. With only memories and a photo, she makes plans to go find her sister. Will they be able to find her with just a photo?

title: A Memory From The Past
overview: Kuromi is excited to see her big sister! As she’s en route to Paris, she goes down memory lane. Will she be reunited with her super nice and super smart sister?

title: Kuromi in Paris
overview: Kuromi made it to her first destination, Paris. As she’s looking for her sister, she bumps into 3 guys who mistakenly take her for someone else. Are they looking for her sister as well? Will she be bumping into any new friends on her journey to find her sister?

title: Kuromi Overload
overview: While in Paris, Kuromi reminisces about her sister with Gureco and Baku. But Gureco wants more than just to help Miss Kuromi. Find out what magical mishaps happen when Gureco’s around.

title: Goodbye, Kuromi
overview: Baku and Gureco find Kuromi and a NEW friend in the kitchen. What new adventures and food await for the four of them?

title: Life is a Cheesecake
overview: Kuromi and crew are now in New York looking for Romina (and cheesecake). So what better way to enjoy her time than in a musical number fit for broadway.

title: A Star is Born
overview: While in New York Kuromi bumps into an executive producer who promises fame will help her find her sister. But will fame be enough for Miss Kuromi’s cheeky personality?

title: Online Persona
overview: While on her phone, Kuromi and crew plot what their next foodie adventure while naming their new friend. Can you guess what name Kuromi picked?

title: Kuromi’s Tiny Adventure
overview: While thinking about her sister, Kuromi remembers a moment when she went to go look for Dim Sum for her sister. Always making sure her sister had the best, so can you guess what the next location would be for Kuromi and crew?

title: Enter the Pink Skull
overview: While in Hong Kong, Kuromi bumps into the trio  Koro, Moru, Hachi. After dealing with them she finds a new clue. And a new adventure awaits!

title: Just Like Kuromi
overview: Gureco wants to impress Miss Kuromi with her style. Will she be able to stand out for Miss Kuromi? Watch and find out!

title: The Odd Couple
overview: While in Seoul, Kuromi gets asked to be on a dating show. Will she find her match?

title: Baku The Housekeeper
overview: Ever wonder what a day with Baku looks like? Baku takes on a day of housekeeping with his new friend Koni.

title: A New Talent
overview: While in Cancún, Kuromi makes Collimo enter into a Lucha Libre tournament in hopes of winning a wish granted. Will he be strong enough to win?

title: What Romina Wants
overview: Romina sees Kuromi excited watching her favorite TV character. She wonders what she would need to do to make Kuromi more focused on her. Will she figure out what she’s missing?

title: Penguin Court
overview: While in Antarctica, Kuromi and Collimo are starving looking for Romina. They find a pile of fish to eat, but soon find out that was not a good idea. Find out what happens when they go to penguin court.

title: Romina vs The Evil Crew
overview: The evil crew is out of expenses so they need to think of an alternative plan to lure in Romina. But who or what will get Romina’s attention the quickest?

title: The Worst Day Ever
overview: Gureco shares some very important information to Kuromi. Could this be the worst news for Kuromi?

title: Transformation Sequence
overview: Baku finds out that Koni’s drawings are more than just drawings. Could Koni help Kuromi find her sister Romina?

title: The Truth Comes Out
overview: Romina and Kuromi are together at last, but will Kuromi be able to protect her from the evil crew and their boss? And what more truth will be told?

title: Goodbye, Romina
overview: In the final episode, find out if Kuromi can save Romina. Is this goodbye forever?

title: Get Me Out Of This World!
overview: It’s Halloween…and Kuromi’s birthday! In this episode, Kuromi is in a grumpy mood. Will she snap out of her bad mood and have fun at the party?

title: Kuromi in Zombie World
overview: Oh no, Kuromi is surrounded by zombies! All of her friends have turned into zombies. Will she drink the special scallion cola and turn into a zombie herself?

title: A Dashing Hero
overview: The Multiverse Protection Agency sent Niko to help Kuromi escape the zombie multiverse she’s trapped in. Will Niko be able to successfully help her get out?

title: Zombie Kuromi Wants to Party
overview: Kuromi is getting chased by zombies! Will the multiverse mobile device be able to save her?

title: The Tragic Life of Lady Kuromi
overview: Kuromi and Niko land in Gothic World. Will they like it there?

title: No More Goody Two Shoes
overview: Gothic World version of Kuromi tries to become the queen of the world! Will she succeed?

title: Infinity Tempest Crossover
overview: Gothic world Kuromi and Kuromi settle their dispute with a ping pong match! Who will win?

title: Plush Kuromi and the Claw of Fate
overview: Oh no, Kuromi is trapped in a toy claw machine! Will she be able to escape or be stuck forever?

title: A Visitor From the Shadows
overview: Kuromi’s multiverse friends make all of her favorite foods for her to cheer her up, but Kuromi is acting strange. Is she the real Kuromi?

title: A Modern Day Fairy Tale
overview: Kuromi stumbles into a fairy tale and has a crush. She’s getting distracted when she should be trying to find her way out of the fairy tale!

title: Manga Artist Kuromi & Looming Deadline
overview: Manga artist Kuromi needs a miracle to finish her manga before the deadline! Find out if she gets her miracle and finishes her manga!

title: The Trouble with Dark Kuromi
overview: Kuromi thinks she’s finally home, but then she gets transported into a wormhole by dark shadow Kuromi!

title: The Truth About Nico
overview: Find out the truth about what happened to Nico’s parents! Can Nico help Kuromi and himself?

title: Across the Multiverse
overview: Kuromi meets Nico’s parents and she hears their story about how they became trapped in Darkness World. Will she be able to help them escape and reunite with Nico?

title: Play Time with My Melody
overview: Kuromi sees My Melody and gets to play with her! See what fun they get up to together.

title: Now or Never
overview: Darkness World Kuromi is jealous of the real Kuromi. She doesn’t understand why her friends like the real Kuromi better!

title: Kuromi’s Assemble!
overview: No matter how many multiverse Kuromi’s there are, there’s just one real Kuromi!

title: Nico’s Choice
overview: Nico does a very brave act to help the people of the multiverse! Find out how he helps Kuromi.

title: This Is the World I Love
overview: Kuromi learns what Kuromify The World is all about! Watch her discover the true meaning.
